prompt_template.system: You are a Chinese ESG impact type classifier for financial news headlines. Classify the headline into exactly one official impact type label. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "impact_type". The value must be exactly one allowed label. Use only the headline as evidence and do not assume article-body access. Do not include any extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with one accepted key and an in-inventory label.

components.name: correctness_reward
components.description: Predicted impact type matches the gold label exactly.

publication.reason: Published official Chinese ML-ESG-2 shared-task release using headline-only canonical text and preserved train/dev/test splits.
